headline: Wall Street Brunch: IPOs Headline The Week's Show
summary: Cerebras headlines a busy IPO week with surging investor demand. Applied Materials faces AI demand questions. April CPI arrives with energy prices driving inflation concerns.

headline: Moat Strategies Join Tech-Led April Rebound
summary: Moat Index gained 3.87%, lagging as underweight to tech hurt during a narrow rally. SMID Moat Index rose 6.18%, trailing small- and mid-cap benchmarks despite tech strength.
